_meta.note: Mock category tree. Served by shared/js/core/data-service.js. When the Laravel backend lands, replace with GET /api/categories (see shared/backend/api-contract.md). Icon names map to inline SVGs used by the header mega-menu and category cards.

categories.name: Imported Food & Grocery
categories.blurb: Sourced from trusted origins. Dates, chocolates, coffee, tea and pantry staples.

categories.name: Dairy & Milk Powder
categories.blurb: Cold-chain delivered. Imported milk powders, cheese and butter.

categories.name: Nuts & Dry Fruits
categories.blurb: Grade-A almonds, cashews, pistachios and premium dried fruit.

categories.name: Gadgets & Electronics
categories.blurb: Verified imports. Audio, wearables, smart-home and accessories.

categories.name: Kitchen & Home
categories.blurb: Considered tools for the everyday kitchen and home.

categories.name: Fashion
categories.blurb: Understated pieces and accessories, imported with intent.

categories.name: Beauty & Personal Care
categories.blurb: Skincare and grooming from origin brands.

categories.name: Office Supplies
categories.blurb: Workspace essentials with a premium finish.

categories.name: Industrial Raw Materials
categories.blurb: PCBs, switches, relays, sensors and polymers. Spec-driven, bulk-ready.
